description: Face-verified staff attendance system with WhatsApp notifications

actors.staff: Shop employee using the kiosk laptop
actors.admin: Shop owner/manager on their phone or device

kiosk: Only show the action the staff NEEDS right now — no extra buttons
Large text, large buttons — readable from standing distance
Staff never types anything — only tap + look at camera
Max 2 screens: Grid → Camera → Done (auto returns)
admin: Dashboard is one scrollable page — no tabs within tabs
Color = meaning: green=present, yellow=lunch, red=absent, gray=departed
Every notification is one tap to resolve

kiosk_session.login: One-time setup by admin — never logs out
kiosk_session.access: Public (any staff can tap — verification is the identity check)

W1_morning_arrival.title: Staff Morning Arrival
W1_morning_arrival.trigger: Staff taps [Mark Arrived] on their card

steps.action: Opens kiosk page on laptop
Finds their name card (status: Absent)
Taps [Mark Arrived] button
Opens camera modal with countdown 3-2-1
Captures face from webcam stream
Runs face-api.js: extract descriptor from live feed
Compares with stored descriptor from DB
Decision: face match?

yes_match.action: Call CallMeBot API: send WhatsApp to admin
Show success screen: ✅ Welcome Ravi! 09:02 AM
Toast notification pops up: Ravi arrived at 09:02 AM
Admin receives: ✅ Ravi arrived at 09:02 AM

no_match.action: Call CallMeBot: send WhatsApp with photo URL
Show error screen: ❌ Face not recognized
Toast notification: ⚠️ Verification failed for Ravi
Admin receives: ⚠️ Verification FAILED for Ravi. [photo link]

steps.action: Taps [Going for Lunch] on their card
Opens camera → face scan → match check
Decision: match?

yes_match.action: Show: 🍱 Have a great lunch, Ravi!

steps.action: Taps [Back from Lunch] on their card
Opens camera → face scan → match check
Decision: match?
Taps [Mark Departed] on their card
Opens camera → face scan → match check
Decision: match?

W5_absence_report.title: Staff Reports a Colleague as Missing
W5_absence_report.trigger: Staff taps [Report Absence] button on kiosk

steps.action: Taps [Report Absence] (bottom of kiosk page)
Shows simple form: Who is missing? + Report type
Selects: missing staff name + type (morning/lunch)
Adds optional note + taps [Send Report]
Writes to absence_reports table
Sends WhatsApp to admin
Fires realtime notification to admin dashboard
Shows: ✅ Report sent to admin
Sees pop-up + can respond from dashboard

W5_absence_report.whatsapp_message: 🚨 Absence Report: *{absent_name}* has not {arrived/returned}. Reported by *{reporter}* at *{time}*

steps.action: Opens admin URL on phone
Auth check: login if not authenticated
Sees dashboard: stat cards + live staff grid
Supabase Realtime WebSocket open — listening for events
Any staff action fires → realtime event received
Toast notification appears + bell count increments
Can tap notification → see full detail
Can tap any staff card → see that staff's full day timeline

W7_face_registration.title: Admin Registers New Staff Face

steps.action: Goes to Staff → Add New Staff
Fills: Name, Role, Phone
Either uploads 1–5 photos OR uses live webcam to take photo
Runs face-api.js on each photo → extracts descriptor vector
Averages all descriptors into one stored vector
Saves staff record + face_descriptor to DB
Staff card appears on kiosk immediately

W7_face_registration.tip: More photos (different angles, lighting) = higher verification accuracy

W8_end_of_day_auto.title: Automated End-of-Day Job

steps.action: Query all staff with status != departed for today
Mark remaining present/on_lunch staff as departed (auto)
Mark any still-absent staff as absent for the day
Calculate totals for all staff
Build daily summary message
Send summary WhatsApp to admin

elements: Header: Shop name + live clock (HH:MM AM/PM) + today's date
Staff grid (2 columns on tablet, 3 on desktop)
Each card: photo circle, name, status badge, ONE action button
No login, no menu, no navigation
kiosk_home.simplicity_note: Staff should be able to use this in 5 seconds without instructions

elements: Large text: 'Hello Ravi, look at the camera'
Camera feed inside animated circle ring
No buttons — fully automatic after tap
Dropdown: Who is missing? (only shows absent/unaccounted staff)
Radio: Morning no-show / Hasn't returned from lunch
Top: 4 stat chips — Present | Absent | On Lunch | Departed
Staff status grid (same visual as kiosk but read-only + tappable)
Recent events feed (last 10 events, live updating)
Unresolved absence reports alert banner (if any)
Bell icon with unread count in header
Table: Name | Arrived | Lunch Out | Back | Departed | Hours | Status
Staff list with photo + name + role + status dot
Edit form: name/role/phone fields + photo upload + [Re-register Face] button
Each card: who's missing, reported by, time, type
Tap → expand with notes + [Mark Resolved] + admin response field
Work Start / Lunch Window / Work End time pickers

flow: Load models once on kiosk page init (cached after first load)
Also load all staff face_descriptors from DB on init
On verify: detect face in video stream
Use FaceMatcher to compare with all stored descriptors
face_verification_logic.threshold_note: Lower = stricter. 0.4 is very strict, 0.6 is lenient. Default 0.5 works well.
face_verification_logic.capture_on_fail: canvas.toDataURL() → base64 → upload to Supabase Storage

setup_steps: 2. Send WhatsApp message: 'I allow callmebot to send me messages'

database_tables_summary.staff: Staff profiles + stored face descriptor vector
database_tables_summary.attendance: One row per staff per day — all 4 timestamps + computed hours
database_tables_summary.attendance_events: Immutable log of every single action + photo URL
database_tables_summary.absence_reports: Reports filed by staff about missing colleagues

claude_code_build_order.task: Supabase project setup + run SQL schema
Backend: Express server + all API routes + WhatsApp service
Frontend: Kiosk home page + staff cards
Backend: Cron job for daily summary
PWA config + deployment to Vercel + Railway
